notes: 65 hand-curated queries against the 15 PROBLEM_TEMPLATES. expected_template_indices reference the list index of stress_agents.PROBLEM_TEMPLATES (0-based). Reordering that list is a fixture-breaking change. expected_match_quality drives graded nDCG only — it is not asserted directly. Categories drive harness behaviour: out_of_corpus and robustness_edge skip recall/MRR/nDCG and only assert no-high-quality-match; cross_topic_confusion contributes to recall/MRR AND additionally asserts that non-target templates do not earn match_quality=exact.
